form.formComment: Returns from a 35-day let-up. At the latest run sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 3rd of 10 at this track on March 7 over 1300m, 2.25 len behind Ssoara Haha carrying 54.5kg at $66. The race before that second last of 11 at this track on January 25 over 1200m, 17 len behind Cheong Wol carrying 54.5kg at $47.10. Nice effort last time so worth following up.
